chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI Special Customs Reference Applications 667 & 668 of 2022 ___________________________________________________________ DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE(S) ___________________________________________________________ 1. For orders on CMA No. 3779/2022 2. For orders on office objection NO.1, 4, 7, & 12 3. For orders on CMA No. 3780/2022 4. For hearing of main case 5. For orders on CMA No. 3781/2022 6. For orders on CMA No. 3782/2022 04.11.2025 Mr. Muhammad Khalil Dogar, advocate for the applicant Under instructions learned counsel for the applicant does not press these reference applications which are dismissed as withdrawn. A copy of this order may be sent under the seal of this Court and the signature of the Registrar to the learned Customs Appellate Tribunal, as required per section 196 of the Customs Act, 1969. Office is instructed to place copy of this order in connected matter. Judge Judge Amjad
